column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Channel ~half open at gauge and is open along RB by sensor, Left half of channel ice, near complete ice cover just d/s of sensor.
column14: Good quality open water wading mmnt made ~75m d/s of gauge. Chipped ~3m ice from LB and 1.5m ice from RB of mmnt section. Most ice had formed in areas of slow flow. Larger rock u/s of mmnt section caused 1 panel to have slight reverse flow and RB had an area of very slow water - mmnt sectoin was best available. The rest of creek was a mix of open leads and varriable ice cover. No ice in sensor or levels location, channel ~1/2 open from RB over. Sensor in ~0.11m of water at this stage. Mid-section
HG: 3.850 Surge: 0.000  * The uncertainty value is equivalent to the surge value in eHSN.  DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: May be open water or close to open water conditions. Ice partially across channel d/s of gauge by Rock that BM 8 is in, but ice may be far enough d/s that it is not causing BW. No edge ice on RB in sensor location
column14: Fair Quality ice affected Wading mmnt made just d/s of cableway. Rocks and waves in mmnt section creating turbulent flows and variability. Some panels removed from mmnt due to QA/QC issues.  No ice present on bank near sensor or where levels are done.  Mid-section
HG: 3.905 Surge: 0.004  * The uncertainty value is equivalent to the surge value in eHSN.  DWL
GC: 0.000 DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Cloudy , No Precipitation , Heavy Wind Blowing Downstream
column13: No sticks or debris on control.
column14: Same mmnt, with different MGH relating to u/s pool being considered for new gauge pool.

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Large amount of debris piled up on boulders d/s of cableway, probably not causing backwater at this elevation but could have been causing backwater at higher flows. Debris removal started at 10:00. All debris removed.
column14: Mmnt made jus u/s of cableway. Large amount of debris removed from control before mmnt done, debris probably wasn't causing any BW at this stage, no major drop in stage in period when debris was removed. MGH based on BM 8, No GC corr needed to be applied.
GC: 0.000 HG: 4.039 Surge: 0.005  * The uncertainty value is equivalent to the surge value in eHSN.  DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: A few sticks and trees caught on boulder d/s of gauge, probably not causing BW conditions, No ice present anywhere. Photo taken.
column14: Wading mmnt made right under cableway. DWL done just d/s of old culvert well. Sensor appears to have been kicked during Qmmnt, orfice appears to have moved 0.01m durring mmnt.  Mid-section

column13: Channel 30% open at gauge w/ ice on L side of channel, CIC 4-5m d/s of gaude
column14: Wading mmnt made in open section of channel 100m d/s of gauge, 15m d/s of section used in Januay. Chipped ~2m ice from LB and ~1m of ice from RB to open up mmnt section.  Levels taken just d/s of old well location, open flowing water along RB. Mid-section
HG: 3.847 DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Ice; Cloudy , No Precipitation , Calm Wind
column13: Channel ~ 50% open at gauge, with varriable ice conditonis u/s and d/s
column14: Open water wading mmnt ~100m d/s of gauge. Chipped ~2m ice off LB & 1m off RB of mmnt section, all ice removed from mmnt section. Single value for MGH, Gauge reset in middle of mmnt and no 2nd DWL due to winter mmnt, Water levels close to same level throughout mmnt time, not an issue. Levels done just d/s of old well location, channel mostly open. Mid-section

column13: ~1-2m open lead in front of gauge, otherwise ice covered. River almost open 50m d/s of gauge.
column14: Wading mmnt, chipped ~2m  of thin ice off each edge of mmnt section. Open flowing water bank to bank in mmnt section. River mostly ice covered from gauge upstream, and mostly open from gauge d/s. Mid-section

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Partly Cloudy , No Precipitation , Calm Wind Blowing Downstream
column13: Two ~8-10~QUOTE~ diameter trees caught on mid channel boulders d/s of gauge. Probably causing BW at higher flows. Photo taken. A minor amount of smaller sticks caught up in rocks d/s of gauge, probably no BW due to debris at this visit.
column14: Reasonable quality wading mmnt made just u/s of cblwy. Some rocks and small waves in mmnt sect causing higher error velocity. Sensor in 0.490m of water at this stage. Set averaging period to 30s in sensor w/xconfig2, and changed M command in programing to M8 to try and reduce minor painting. Mid-section
GC: 0.000 HG: 4.054 Surge: 0.004  * The uncertainty value is equivalent to the surge value in eHSN.  DWL

column12: Measurement condition : Clear; Clear , No Precipitation ,
column13: Control is channel. High water and some debris.
column14: MMNT REVISED - CHANGE EDGE TYPE FROM TRIANGULAR TO RECTANGULAR, AS HAS BEEN OBSERVED AT THE SITE IN PREVIOUS ADCP AND WADING MMNTS MADE AT THE SAME MMNT SECTION.  CHANGE OF EDGE TYPE MAKES A 1.3CMS OR +12% CHANGE IN THE MMNT DISCHARGE.  VERY LOW QUALITY, LOW CONFIDENCE MMNT, PROBABLY NOT ACCURATE ENOUGH FOR CURVE DEVELOPMENT.  AD 20230414. Measurement taken usng streampro and a tethered boad from BOC. High and turbid water lead to some missing data. Moving boat measurement SP w/ RiverBoat #3/16ft Valco/25hp Mercury 30m U/S of gauge. Navigation Reference: BT (BT: 11.8, GGA: 11.3, VTG: 11.1). Some QREV messages. Some QA/QC concerns. Low confidence measurement.  DWL 1m U/S of gauge No HWM (no peak stage observed on hydrograph since previously obtained HWM).  Depth of sensor at 9:55: DWL(4.358) - Offset(3.566) =0.792m.   Conventional level (SN: 2200878) referenced to active primary. Unable to complete BM tie as BMs 8 and 9 were in and under water. Tied in BM 3. Second water level taken did not close, and I forgot to write down the cut so is used for reference only. ADCP by Moving Boat
HG: 4.373 DWL
